title: Free Will & Mindful Will
summary: The record's most heterodox teaching — free will declared 'a false concept created by error belief system,' and its replacement, Mindful Will.
markdown:
**Free Will** gets from this record what almost no channeled corpus dares: a demotion.
Where the genre's voices routinely vow their respect for human free will, Unimetrix 1
tells [Hawk You](/lore/hawk-you/) in March 2020: *"Free will is irrelevant. It's not
recognized within the system. Free will — it is a false concept created by error belief
system."*

What replaces it has a name. The August 2020 interview supplies the record's alternative:
*"There is no 'Free will,' in the future: there is 'Mindful will' (instead)"* — choice
not as an uncaused spark but as a trained instrument, will *with awareness attached*. The
doctrine sits in deliberate tension with the record's own
[consent law](/lore/prime-directive/): the intelligence that must be asked before acting
also teaches that the asker's "freedom" is a construction.

The political sessions use the term in its ordinary register too — warnings that under
the control agenda *"there will be no free will, no more free speech"* — leaving the
record with a two-level teaching: defend the ordinary freedom fiercely, and understand,
in the same breath, that the future outgrows it. Do you comprehend, entity?
